start.speaker: Adrian
start.text: Krimora threw me in this cage and left the key to rust. Break this hold and I will repay it blade for blade.

choices.text: You're coming with me. We cut our way out together.
You've already made it out with me.

rescued.speaker: Adrian
rescued.text: Then let's move before Krimora notices the chain is broken.

already_rescued.speaker: Adrian
already_rescued.text: I owe you a life already. Use it where the fight is thickest.

end.speaker: Adrian
end.text: I'll keep the bars rattling until you come back.
